equip.name: Moment of Victory
equip.desc: "If you want to cry after your loss, Gepard, then cry." "But you need to stand back up even when you are crying, until you can defeat me... Even if it takes years." A few years later, the boy no longer cried or lost to his sister. Now on the battle field, the courageous Silvermane Guard captain will defend till the end no matter what — all to find the moment to completely destroy the enemy.

relics.name: Knight's Forgiving Casque
relics.desc: A casque that resembles the religious stone statues of the Goddess of Forgiveness. It was used to hide the wearer's appearance.

relics.name: Thief's Gloves With Prints
relics.desc: A pair of special gloves interlaced with nanomaterials. The prints on its surface can change in real time.

relics.name: Musketeer's Wind-Hunting Shawl
relics.desc: A knitted cape in an ethnic style, lined with bulletproof fibers.

relics.name: Champion's Fleetfoot Boots
relics.desc: Intricately crafted from leather and mesh, the combination of a thick insole and thin outsole ensures the wearer can be agile on their feet.

ornaments.name: Herta's Space Station
ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is the Herta Space Station. Parked above The Blue, it slowly drifts along its predetermined orbit, with the silent cosmos looking like a book waiting to be read.

ornaments.name: The Xianzhou Luofu's Ambrosial Arbor Vines
ornaments.desc: Once, the Luofu reigned supreme over other ships in the Xianzhou fleet due to the grace of the Ambrosial Arbor. Later, when people consumed the cursed fruit of immortality, calamity was brought upon the Luofu by the Ambrosial Arbor, whose vines had already entrapped the Luofu in its firm and inseparable grip.

equip.name: Geniuses' Repose
equip.desc: She pointed at that green rice cake. "The experiment has ended. Time to take a break. I just can't miss this freshly made dessert." She saw the puppet girl frowning in deep thought. "Well, in your current body, you can only look but not eat. I'll make you a box of new ones when the time comes." She saw the mechanical aristocrat hesitating at his own cup. "Don't worry. It's only machine oil. Perfectly safe for you to consume."

relics.name: Grand Duke's Crown of Netherflame
relics.desc: A crown of unceasing flame, with its burning ambition serving as its inexhaustible fuel.

relics.name: Grand Duke's Gloves of Fieryfur
relics.desc: Pure white gloves with flames as its fur, hiding its brutality under smooth silk.

relics.name: Grand Duke's Robe of Grace
relics.desc: A gorgeous robe that emphasizes the dignity and elegance of its owner.

relics.name: Passerby's Stygian Hiking Boots
relics.desc: A durable pair of boots that have left shoe-prints on many worlds and have witnessed many lethal situations.

ornaments.name: Herta's Space Station
ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is the Herta Space Station. Parked above The Blue, it slowly drifts along its predetermined orbit, with the silent cosmos looking like a book waiting to be read.

ornaments.name: Herta's Wandering Trek
ornaments.desc: Madam Herta lost all interest in the space station the moment it was complete. The station maintains a steady orbital velocity as it circles The Blue, leaving a track of its circular motion on the planet below.

equip.name: Post-Op Conversation
equip.desc: "You're awake... Thank you." "You... saved my life, Natasha. The one who should be saying thanks... is me." "No, I should be thanking you... for holding on until I finished the surgery." The doctor and patient smiled wearily at each other and said nothing more.

relics.name: Passerby's Rejuvenated Wooden Hairstick
relics.desc: A withered twig that was used as a hairstick, with new flower buds sprouting on the end. Now, the past is long gone, and the stick inlaid with parcel-gilt flower buds commemorates the beginning of a new life.

relics.name: Passerby's Roaming Dragon Bracer
relics.desc: Bracers made from flowing coral gold and the leather of unknown beasts. Only master artisans from the Vidyadhara dragon race can create this kind of superior armor.

relics.name: Passerby's Ragged Embroided Coat
relics.desc: An old coat with a ragged hemline. The embroidery has been ruined by blade marks. Flesh heals quickly, but a coat does not, nor does a person's pain.

relics.name: Passerby's Stygian Hiking Boots
relics.desc: A durable pair of boots that have left shoe-prints on many worlds and have witnessed many lethal situations.

ornaments.name: Herta's Space Station
ornaments.desc: Encapsulated in the plane is the Herta Space Station. Parked above The Blue, it slowly drifts along its predetermined orbit, with the silent cosmos looking like a book waiting to be read.

ornaments.name: Herta's Wandering Trek
ornaments.desc: Madam Herta lost all interest in the space station the moment it was complete. The station maintains a steady orbital velocity as it circles The Blue, leaving a track of its circular motion on the planet below.

relics.name: Musketeer's Wild Wheat Felt Hat
relics.desc: A cowboy hat decorated with wild wheat — a mark of the legendary Musketeer Oakley.

relics.name: Musketeer's Coarse Leather Gloves
relics.desc: A pair of leather gloves with partially cracked surfaces. The part where one holds a gun is particularly worn out.

relics.name: Musketeer's Wind-Hunting Shawl
relics.desc: A knitted cape in an ethnic style, lined with bulletproof fibers.

relics.name: Musketeer's Rivets Riding Boots
relics.desc: These riding boots have a V-shaped cutout. Appearing casual and loose, they are also very comfortable to wear.

ornaments.name: Herta's Space Station

ornaments.name: Herta's Wandering Trek
ornaments.desc: Madam Herta lost all interest in the space station the moment it was complete. The station maintains a steady orbital velocity as it circles The Blue, leaving a track of its circular motion on the planet below.

equip.name: Day One of My New Life
equip.desc: "So happy I got to see Pom-Pom in new clothes today! I like it~" "Today's my birthday! I'm still as cute as ever." "Today, I finally finally finally have a junior! Isn't that right, Trailblazer?" We click the shutter many times without thinking. Do we do that to capture the happiness at that moment? Or to capture ourselves at that moment?

relics.name: Thief's Myriad-Faced Mask
relics.desc: A mask used to change one's facial appearance. Coupled with evocative acting skills, it can help you deceive anyone.

relics.name: Thief's Gloves With Prints
relics.desc: A pair of special gloves interlaced with nanomaterials. The prints on its surface can change in real time.

relics.desc: A knitted cape in an ethnic style, lined with bulletproof fibers.

relics.name: Thief's Meteor Boots
relics.desc: A pair of boots that enhances any human's physical prowess. It helps the Meteor Thief stride between buildings.

ornaments.name: The Xianzhou Luofu's Celestial Ark
ornaments.desc: The Xianzhou Luofu floating above the seas of stars was enclosed within the sphere. Skiffs went to and fro through the Jade Gate just like the celestial movements of stars and moons. Countless people had come here to seek the secrets of immortality, only to return in disappointment.

ornaments.name: The Xianzhou Luofu's Ambrosial Arbor Vines
ornaments.desc: Once, the Luofu reigned supreme over other ships in the Xianzhou fleet due to the grace of the Ambrosial Arbor. Later, when people consumed the cursed fruit of immortality, calamity was brought upon the Luofu by the Ambrosial Arbor, whose vines had already entrapped the Luofu in its firm and inseparable grip.

equip.name: Flames Afar
equip.desc: "Package secured. I'll leave covering our retreat to you." Their comrade's voice comes through the communicator. They glance around the surroundings, watching as the savaged remnants of their enemies continue to pass through the complex architecture inside the vast and abandoned structure. They are drawing ever closer. "Please hold." After a beat of quietude, a series of apocalyptic explosions rocket up into the sky. Waves of displaced air cast clouds of dust high across the battlefield, and smoke scatter in all directions, the blinding white cleaving light into the night. "You know they purposely planted loads of gunpowder in there, right?" With a rustle, they flung open the cape as if they just finished a leisurely stroll. "Of course." "So, let's light it up. All I need to do is play the part of the match."

relics.name: Watchmaker's Telescoping Lens
relics.desc: An eyepiece with gold carvings. The lens reflects the wonders from far away to help its owner peer through the illusory dreams.

relics.name: Watchmaker's Fortuitous Wristwatch
relics.desc: A wristwatch of fine craftsmanship. It contains a unique watch face and clock hands. It is said to be the symbol of good luck in the Dreamscape.

relics.name: Grand Duke's Robe of Grace
relics.desc: A gorgeous robe that emphasizes the dignity and elegance of its owner.

relics.name: Thief's Meteor Boots
relics.desc: A pair of boots that enhances any human's physical prowess. It helps the Meteor Thief stride between buildings.

equip.name: River Flows in Spring
equip.desc:
The young boy took a short break from his sword practice.
The sunlight was baking his already heated neck. He slowly got into the water, whose coldness touched his bare feet.
When the bell chimes and birds tweet, even the people far away would know that springtime had arrived.

equip.name: A Secret Vow
equip.desc:
The boy would always make sure that his gloves and elbow guards were in good shape before leaving.
He treasured his gloves more than anything because they were tight enough to hide secrets.
With this layer of protection, no one could see the bandages on his hand and the wound beneath them.
He would be treated as if he was normal, and he would be greeted just like everyone else.

That was all he asked for.

relics.name: Champion's Headgear
relics.desc: Boxing headgear that provides excellent protection. It perfectly fits the shape of the owner's face.

relics.name: Champion's Heavy Gloves
relics.desc: A pair of boxing gloves kept in excellent condition. Some slight wear doesn't hinder their effectiveness.

relics.name: Champion's Chest Guard
relics.desc: A boxer's professional-level chest guard. The outer and inner padding is designed to provide protection while not hindering movement.

relics.name: Thief's Meteor Boots
relics.desc: A pair of boots that enhances any human's physical prowess. It helps the Meteor Thief stride between buildings.

equip.name: Data Bank
equip.desc: A drop of strength condensed from time itself. All the seemingly insignificant moments come together to form the magnificent choir of fate. "Human extinction is inevitable, but the library will live on: Lonely, immobile, and hidden from the public. Its vast collection is useless, yet pure from corruption."

equip.name: Dance! Dance! Dance!
equip.desc: "Why couldn't Hook do a spinning dance move, just like how Clara does?" She clenched her tiny fists and pouted her cute lips, her chubby little face looking redder than ever under her signature felt hat. "Please, Mr. Svarog, can you please help Hook with this?" Without saying any words, Mr. Svarog began to hold out his robotic arm. "I'm g—gonna be sick!!! Put me down now! Please!"

equip.name: Hidden Shadow
equip.desc: A drop of strength condensed from time itself. All the seemingly insignificant moments come together to form the magnificent choir of fate. "The Nihility might find us, but there is a non-zero chance that they might not."

equip.name: Under the Blue Sky
equip.desc:
Under the blue sky, fields of wheat were dancing.
The young girl was carefully weaving a flower wreath,
for her most beloved little sister.

That was when they were still the same height.
That was when they shared the same smile.

equip.name: Make the World Clamor
equip.desc: She stood on the stage, waving at her audience, encouraging them to make their voice heard. Songs, shouts, or laments — anything that makes a sound. Voice your thoughts, so others can come to help. "Don't make your heart as cold as this concrete jungle." — Make the world clamor.

relics.name: Band's Polarized Sunglasses
relics.desc: A pair of classic sunglasses worn by one of the lead singers, Janis, whose chrome lenses reflect a blue hue.

relics.name: Band's Touring Bracelet
relics.desc: Bassist Sid's bracelet, woven from silk wristbands from tours. Several lines of lyrics are written on it.

relics.name: Band's Leather Jacket With Studs
relics.desc: David, one of the band's lead singers, drew a white star on the back of this leather jacket and made it the cover of the band's final album.

relics.name: Band's Ankle Boots With Rivets
relics.desc: Drummer Bonham's ankle boots, the dark leather surface glued with rivets reflecting the stage lights.

ornaments.name: Herta's Space Station

equip.name: Memories of the Past
equip.desc:
An old photo lies on the far end of the table in the guardian's residence.
She would always subconsciously move her eyes away whenever she happened to see it.
The memories of the past had already become distant, but the dreams of today still linger.

relics.name: Genius's Metafield Suit
relics.desc: Diving-suit-like attire that envelops the body when activated, sending neural signals from your whole body to the metafield in real time.

relics.name: Genius's Gravity Walker
relics.desc: A wearable gravity-capture device. It is shaped like a pair of ice skates that reflects the stars' twinkling lights during quick gliding.

equip.name: The Seriousness of Breakfast
equip.desc: Though the table is set... Some people want a cup of tea first. Some people want to take a picture first. Some people want to read the newspaper first. Some people want to write a page in their notebook first. Some people want to play on their phone first. "All of you, eat while the food is hot!"

relics.name: Genius's Ultraremote Sensing Visor
relics.desc: A pair of communication goggles embedded with ultraremote sensing technology that breaks through the shackles of limited transmission and remote distances.

relics.name: Genius's Frequency Catcher
relics.desc: A pair of gloves equipped with a precision frequency-capture device, which enables direct manipulation of otherwise-intangible sound and light vibrations.

equip.name: For Tomorrow's Journey
equip.desc: The hands of the compass keep turning until they point to the moment of dreams. The Asdana system, overflowing with memoria, glows with a soft light outside the train's windows. The frontier prison within is currently engulfed in the fires of war. "Hey guys, what do you suppose the world within the dream would look like?? I must meticulously map it out!" The girl, packing away her surveying tools, gazes at the new world within reach, filled with anticipation. "That place is a mess. Don't you run off once we get there. I won't have you two getting kidnapped again..." The man in cowboy attire grumbles as he cleans his weapon, then walks over to the sofa with a drink, shaking his head in resignation. "The Land of the Dreams promises infinite possibilities. We'll surely make our mark... Hey, conductor, if we fall in love with that place and never return, would you miss us?" The Nameless dressed like a gentleman winks at Pom-Pom, smiling. "'You can't joke at the conductor's expense like this!' Is that what you want to say, conductor?" The girl's mischievous grin spreads across her face. "You guys are! So! Mean!" Bubbles drift up and down in the glass as the Express fills up with joyful laughter. ... The youthful silhouettes of these Nameless get gradually swallowed by memoria. "Have a... safe... trip...please..." When the conductor turns their head, the Express is already empty. The conductor stands frozen, this scene hauntingly familiar, as if lived through countless times before.

relics.name: Thief's Myriad-Faced Mask
relics.desc: A mask used to change one's facial appearance. Coupled with evocative acting skills, it can help you deceive anyone.

relics.name: Thief's Gloves With Prints

relics.name: Thief's Meteor Boots
relics.desc: A pair of boots that enhances any human's physical prowess. It helps the Meteor Thief stride between buildings.

equip.name: Planetary Rendezvous
equip.desc: She had no idea what to expect when she first started out on this journey. All she knew was that she could at long last be rid of the judgmental eyes and petty bickering of her family. She felt she finally understood what the poet was trying to say. "One day, we would grow wings and forget what it was like to walk." The light in her eyes became the glittering stars.

equip.name: Swordplay
equip.desc:
Looking rather skeptical, the girl thrust the small sword at her imaginary enemy in an attempt to convince herself that this thing was useful.
How can something so feeble compete with my two-handed sword? Do enemies even notice when they get stabbed?

The owner of the sword did not seem to care about its size.
After all, enemies are defeated by strategy, not swords.
It doesn't matter whether the sword is heavy or light, as long as you use the pointy end.

relics.desc: Boxing headgear that provides excellent protection. It perfectly fits the shape of the owner's face.

relics.name: Champion's Heavy Gloves
relics.desc: A pair of boxing gloves kept in excellent condition. Some slight wear doesn't hinder their effectiveness.

relics.name: Champion's Fleetfoot Boots
relics.desc: Intricately crafted from leather and mesh, the combination of a thick insole and thin outsole ensures the wearer can be agile on their feet.

equip.name: Cornucopia
equip.desc: A drop of strength condensed from time itself. All the seemingly insignificant moments come together to form the magnificent choir of fate. "Life is the existence of order beyond a certain threshold. Its birth is the final answer to the silent universe, declaring the end to the era of old chaos."

relics.name: Thief's Myriad-Faced Mask
relics.desc: A mask used to change one's facial appearance. Coupled with evocative acting skills, it can help you deceive anyone.

relics.name: Thief's Gloves With Prints

relics.name: Thief's Steel Grappling Hook
relics.desc: A steel cable disguised as a woven belt, with hooks and pulleys hidden in its buckle.

relics.name: Hunter's Soft Elkskin Boots
relics.desc: A pair of enhanced power boots wrapped in soft elk fur. With these, the hunter will only leave shallow footprints behind in the Snow Plains.

equip.name: Indelible Promise
equip.desc: A weathered past. A sworn duty to defend home. A dream to blaze a trail across the world— These were entrusted to the unworldly youth by a pair of rough, calloused hands. "Soon, we'll be able to go to a larger world." The boy happily accepted his inheritance. Guarded by youth, he could not yet feel the weight born by the object's significance. "Of course. Before that time comes, however, guard this place well, Misha." He thus engraved that promise deep inside his heart, holding to it forever and always.

relics.name: Hunter's Artaius Hood
relics.desc: A hood made from the head of a huge Snow Plains bear. The fur seems to be possessed by some ghost or deity, making it invulnerable to physical attacks.

relics.name: Hunter's Lizard Gloves
relics.desc: A pair of tactical gloves, on which scaly claws of snowrock lizards are tightly sewn. It can be used to safely climb up and hang on to any wall.

relics.name: Hunter's Ice Dragon Cloak
relics.desc: A cloak made from the fine scales of the Ice Dragon, nearly invisible under the brilliant refraction of light.

relics.name: Hunter's Soft Elkskin Boots
relics.desc: A pair of enhanced power boots wrapped in soft elk fur. With these, the hunter will only leave shallow footprints behind in the Snow Plains.

ornaments.name: Herta's Wandering Trek
ornaments.desc: Madam Herta lost all interest in the space station the moment it was complete. The station maintains a steady orbital velocity as it circles The Blue, leaving a track of its circular motion on the planet below.

equip.name: The Moles Welcome You
equip.desc: "Moles, moles," "Leaving our holes," "Smart moles fear naught foes," "Moles, moles," "Bite your toes!"

relics.name: Musketeer's Wild Wheat Felt Hat
relics.desc: A cowboy hat decorated with wild wheat — a mark of the legendary Musketeer Oakley.

relics.name: Musketeer's Coarse Leather Gloves
relics.desc: A pair of leather gloves with partially cracked surfaces. The part where one holds a gun is particularly worn out.

relics.name: Musketeer's Wind-Hunting Shawl
relics.desc: A knitted cape in an ethnic style, lined with bulletproof fibers.

relics.name: Thief's Meteor Boots
relics.desc: A pair of boots that enhances any human's physical prowess. It helps the Meteor Thief stride between buildings.

weapon.name: Rust
weapon.desc: A completely rusted iron greatbow. The average person would lack the strength to even lift it, let alone fire it.

weapon.name: Mappa Mare
weapon.desc: A nautical chart featuring nearby currents and climates that somehow found its way into Liyue via foreign traders.

weapon.name: The Flute
weapon.desc: Beneath its rusty exterior is a lavishly decorated thin blade. It swings as swiftly as the wind.

weapon.name: Wolf's Gravestone
weapon.desc: A longsword used by the Wolf Knight. Originally just a heavy sheet of iron given to the knight by a blacksmith from the city, it became endowed with legendary power owing to his friendship with the wolves.

weapon.name: The Flute
weapon.desc: Beneath its rusty exterior is a lavishly decorated thin blade. It swings as swiftly as the wind.

weapon.name: The Widsith
weapon.desc: A heavy notebook filled with musical scores. Though suffering from moth damage and heavy wear-and-tear, there is still much power to be found among the hand-written words within.

weapon.name: Prototype Starglitter
weapon.desc: A hooked spear discovered hidden away in the Blackcliff Forge. The glimmers along the sharp edge are like stars in the night.

weapon.name: Prototype Rancour
weapon.desc: An ancient longsword discovered in the Blackcliff Forge that cuts through rocks like a hot knife through butter.

weapon.name: Xiphos' Moonlight
weapon.desc: This ancient double-edged sword glimmers with moonlight. It is said that a now-silent Jinni dwells within it.

weapon.name: Primordial Jade Winged-Spear
weapon.desc: A jade polearm made by the archons, capable of slaying ancient beasts.

weapon.name: Sacrificial Sword
weapon.desc: A ceremonial sword that has become petrified over time. The trinkets on it are still visible. It grants the wielder the power to withstand the winds of time.

weapon.name: Thrilling Tales of Dragon Slayers
weapon.desc: A fictional story of a band of five heroes who go off on a dragon hunt. It is poorly written and structurally incoherent. Its value lies in the many lessons that can be learned from failure.

weapon.name: Debate Club
weapon.desc: A handy club made of fine steel. The most persuasive line of reasoning in any debater's arsenal.

weapon.name: Dragon's Bane
weapon.desc: A polearm decorated with an entwining golden dragon. Light and sharp, this weapon may very well kill dragons with ease.

weapon.name: Rainslasher
weapon.desc: A fluorescent greatsword with no sharp edge that crushes enemies with brute force and raw power.

weapon.name: Apprentice's Notes
weapon.desc: Notes left behind by a top student. Many useful spells are listed, and the handwriting is beautiful.

weapon.name: Thrilling Tales of Dragon Slayers
weapon.desc: A fictional story of a band of five heroes who go off on a dragon hunt. It is poorly written and structurally incoherent. Its value lies in the many lessons that can be learned from failure.

weapon.name: Twin Nephrite
weapon.desc: A jade pendant formed by piecing together two jade stones.

weapon.name: Wavebreaker's Fin
weapon.desc: A naginata forged from luminescent material deep in the ocean depths. It was once the possession of the tengu race.

weapon.name: Favonius Warbow
weapon.desc: A standard-issue recurve bow of the Knights of Favonius. Only the best archers can unleash its full potential.

weapon.name: Favonius Greatsword
weapon.desc: A heavy ceremonial sword of the Knights of Favonius. It channels elemental power easily and is highly destructive.

weapon.name: Mitternachts Waltz
weapon.desc: A bow painted the color of transgression and nights of illusion.

weapon.name: Ferrous Shadow
weapon.desc: A replica of the famed sword of Arundolyn, the Lion of Light. Feel the power of a legendary hero as you hold this sword in your hand! Imagine yourself as the great warrior himself! Note: Daydreaming not recommended in live combat.

weapon.name: Sacrificial Greatsword
weapon.desc: A ceremonial greatsword that has become petrified over time. The trinkets on it are still visible. It grants the wielder the power to withstand the winds of time.

weapon.name: Eye of Perception
weapon.desc: A dim black glaze pearl that is said to have the power to read the purity of one's heart.

weapon.name: Sacrificial Greatsword
weapon.desc: A ceremonial greatsword that has become petrified over time. The trinkets on it are still visible. It grants the wielder the power to withstand the winds of time.

weapon.name: Hunter's Bow
weapon.desc: A hunter's music consists of but two sounds: the twang of the bowstring and the whoosh of soaring arrows.

weapon.name: Calamity Queller
weapon.desc: A keenly honed weapon forged from some strange crystal. Its faint blue light seems to whisper of countless matters now past.

weapon.name: Sacrificial Bow
weapon.desc: A ceremonial hunting bow that has become petrified over time. The trinkets on it are still visible. It grants the wielder the power to withstand the winds of time.

weapon.name: Lion's Roar
weapon.desc: A sharp blade with extravagant carvings that somehow does not compromise on durability and sharpness. It roars like a lion as it cuts through the air.

weapon.name: The Stringless
weapon.desc: A bow that once served as an extraordinary instrument. It is no longer capable of getting people up and dancing.

weapon.name: Favonius Sword
weapon.desc: A standard-issue longsword of the Knights of Favonius. When you're armed with this agile and sharp weapon, channeling the power of the elements has never been so easy!

weapon.name: Skyward Pride
weapon.desc: A claymore that symbolizes the pride of Dvalin soaring through the skies. When swung, it emits a deep hum as the full force of Dvalin's command of the sky and the wind is unleashed.

weapon.name: Hunter's Bow
weapon.desc: A hunter's music consists of but two sounds: the twang of the bowstring and the whoosh of soaring arrows.

weapon.name: Festering Desire
weapon.desc: A creepy straight sword that almost seems to yearn for life. It drips with a shriveling venom that could even corrupt a mighty dragon.

weapon.name: Sacrificial Fragments
weapon.desc: A weathered script, the text of which is no longer legible. A cursed item eroded by the winds of time.

weapon.name: Raven Bow
weapon.desc: Ravens are known to be the ferrymen of the dead. This bow's limb is decorated with raven feathers, which forebode the imminent death of its target.

weapon.name: Beginner's Protector
weapon.desc: A polearm as straight as a flag pole. Well suited to most combat situations, it has an imposing presence when swung.

weapon.name: Kagotsurube Isshin
weapon.desc: This famed blade was born in a nation to the far north. But in the name of "Isshin," it was stained with many a dark deed on its home-bound journey.

weapon.name: The Bell
weapon.desc: A heavy greatsword. A clock is embedded within it, though its internal mechanisms have long been damaged.

weapon.name: Waster Greatsword
weapon.desc: A sturdy sheet of iron that may be powerful enough to break apart mountains if wielded with enough willpower.

weapon.name: Missive Windspear
weapon.desc: A beacon that shows the direction of the wind. Not every idyll carried on the breeze remains a gentle thing...
